In Bennet et al 2006, they seem to just focus on the maize component of the feed. Email reply: I am sorry but this is so long ago that I cannot remember what we did! I also do not have time to investigate as I have long since moved on from this area of research.

Article Title: From farm to fork – A life cycle assessment of fresh Austrian pork
Author: Winkler et al
Details:
"9.5% mineral feed", and they cite Nemecek et al (2005) as their reference. However:  Reply from Nemecek states: "the cited report is on crop production and grassland only. We did not include animal production there; so there are no feed components.
I seems that the authors used emission factors for feed production from our report." Therefore, it was impossible to tell how/whether the mineral feed components were included or not
